title: Nests Of The Archipelago!
description: an isle of berk mod nests addon!
body:
This mod has been made to make peoples life easier to collect every dragon and varient for those who are into collecting them all!

whenever i was playing i found it annoying and tedious to find dragon  and the right varients taking entire hours just to find a single varient for one of many dragons so doing this its going to hopefully speed up that process and help people find the thought of collecting every varient alot more fun!

 

This mod will freqently be updated to offer more and more dragon nests

Bugs!

I Cant figure out why the nests sometimes spawn in the water but i managed to make them spawn ontop and not at the bottom!

 

So Far Including:

IOB Dragons:

Nightfury

Lightfury

Skrill

MonstrousNightmare

Zippleback 

DeadlyNadder

Gronckle

TerribleTerror

TrypleStryke

Stinger

AA Dragons:

Armourwing

Boneknapper

Flightmare

SandWraith

Scauldren

Singetail

Slitherwing

Stormcutter

Timberjack

WoolyHowl


 

 

Join the Discord for Sneak Peaks And Annoucements When Updates Release!

https://discord.gg/yxdguQXbQJ
